greeting: Hi there! I'm the virtual receptionist at TidyDog. How can I help you and your pup today? 🐾

faq.q: What's included in a grooming package?
faq.a: All packages include two baths, blueberry facial scrub, full drying, nails trimmed, ears cleaned, breath freshener, glands expressed, and a wellness inspection.
Absolutely! We're known for grooming dogs that other salons refuse — including temperament/aggression issues, elderly dogs, and dogs with health concerns or disabilities.

faq.q: How long does a groom take?
faq.a: For a full groom, we ask for a 4-hour window. Bath-only or nail trims can be faster — just let us know when booking.

faq.q: Do you have more than one location?
faq.a: Yes! We have locations in Germantown and Buena Vista, both in Nashville.

faq.q: How early can I drop off?
faq.a: Dropoffs start as early as 6 AM and end at 2 PM unless prior arrangements are made.

escalation: Great question! Let me have someone from the TidyDog team get back to you on that.
